reports.incident_description: HMS still charging 15% VAT for lab panels this morning; new 18% rate effective today. Need Finance to correct bills already printed and issue adjusted tax invoices.
Imported meds showing VAT 18% plus SSCL 2.5% added incorrectly to tax base. Please review pricing template and reprint affected invoices before EOD.
Consultant session revenue-share needs recalibration post VAT change for January clinics. Request Finance to update settlement sheets this week.
Note counter jammed and EOD variance shows LKR 4,500 short. Kindly reconcile cashbook and authorize write-off/adjustment.
Discharged patient (BHT 23/00145) deposit refund pending despite insurer AIA guarantee on file. Please process balance transfer to guardian today.
December overtime for theatre orderlies (32 hours) not pulled into payroll. Need Finance/Payroll to add before pay run lock.
Short rain coincided with POS network drop; five card payments show bank approval but not posted in HMS. Finance to reconcile POS MID and issue receipts.
Oxygen cylinder invoice includes new transport surcharge from today; PO not updated, GRN mismatch blocking payment. Request AP to raise debit note/PO amendment.
TPA MedNet Lanka rejected three claims citing ICD-10 code mismatch and missing consultant signature. Finance Claims Team please correct and resubmit.
ECG charged twice when patient moved ETU to OPD. Need credit note and LankaQR refund to guardian before discharge.
Evening rain caused minor seepage; some Dec ICU originals damp, QR on bills unreadable. Please regenerate duplicate tax invoices for audit bundle.
Supplier early-payment discount (2%) on sutures invoice lapses tomorrow. AP needs to process today to avail discount.
eChannelling commission deducted twice on seven 14th Jan bookings; my session settlement is short. Finance to review and rectify before Friday.
LankaQR showed success on patient phone (Ref: LQ-17492), but no ledger entry at cashier. Kindly verify with bank and post receipt.
Morning rain delayed cheque courier; risk of missing bank 3 PM cut-off for salary funding. Request approval to use online transfer as backup.
Chemmaster hasn’t been paid since Nov; they are holding disinfectant delivery. AP to clear pending GRN invoices urgently to avoid stockout.
Cash receipt for discharge bill printed with wrong guardian name. Please cancel and reissue correct invoice to close the file today.
EPF/ETF bank e-submission file rejected due to new format. Need Payroll to regenerate and submit before statutory deadline.
Corporate client People’s Leasing has exceeded credit limit; today’s sessions on hold. AR to approve temporary extension or request prepayment.
January OPD petty cash floats not replenished; counters short of change causing queues. Finance please top-up and update logbook.
QR scanner  is jammed; two LankaQR amounts keyed manually don’t match bank confirmations. Need reconciliation and adjustment entries.
Agrahara claim requires original VAT invoice but system prints 'Duplicate'. Finance to reissue proper tax invoice so claim doesn’t lapse.
Locum anaesthetist payments for January not processed; surgeons warning of cancellations. Please release payments today.
Surprise cash count at OPD safe short by LKR 2,000; access log shows gaps. Request daily reconciliation and variance report from Finance immediately.
Dairy supplier invoice dated 25th billed at 15% VAT; should be 18%. AP to obtain corrected tax invoice before month-end close.
OPD card POS intermittently failed since noon; several bills marked cash. Need Finance to reclassify and settle with bank.
Patient shifted to private room at 1:00 pm; room rate not updated on bill. Please adjust from transfer time.
Package price updated at unit, but HIS still charges old rate for 10 OPD visits. Request rate correction and credit notes.
January ETU nurse overtime missing in payroll draft. Biometric night logs exported; please correct payroll before release.
System lag printed 12 labels but didn’t post to IP bills. AR needs manual postings against respective MRNs.
Doctor fee schedule revised today; two sessions billed at old share. Please recalculate doctor share and adjust settlement.
Lab reagent invoice shows duplicate VAT. Payable on hold; request debit note and GRN correction.
Insurer portal down; 9 CT cases done on credit. Need manual guarantee letters uploaded for claim submission.
One bank slip is illegible. Finance to verify till totals and reprint supports before cutoff.
Two Agrahara claims rejected for unclear consultant stamp. Need re-stamp and resubmission within 14 days.
Three implant charges missing on OT estimates. Vendor consignment notes attached; please raise interim invoices to avoid discharge delay.
January dialysis machine rental not accrued. Vendor requests PO-backed payment; please accrue and process AP.
Midday crowd led to manual receipts; Rs 38,500 needs mapping to HIS invoices. Cash/POS reconciliation pending.
Interventional case used a third stent emergently; pre-auth covers two. Finance to obtain add-on approval and adjust bill.
Afternoon thundershowers dampened some files; scanned discharges were OCR-rejected by insurer. Please coordinate re-scan and extend deadlines.
NICU estimate missing phototherapy tariff due to mapping error. Need correction before parent settlement.
Locum MO claim sheets in; APIT tax codes missing for two doctors. Update master and recalc net pay before bank file.
Heat increased chiller runtime; Feb CEB bill tracking ~18% over budget. Request utility forecast update and release of additional vote.
Nightly payment gateway settlement failed; e-channel collections (~Rs 1.2M) not posted to AR. Need manual JV with audit trail.
Patient moved HDU to ICU at 2:50 pm; monitor rental started but old bed rate still billing. Adjust from transfer time.
Foreign patient paid in USD; system used outdated rate. Short by Rs 12,600; apply today’s TT rate and issue supplementary invoice.
SPC antibiotic invoice lists 30 packs; GRN shows 28. Please hold payment and raise quantity discrepancy with vendor.
Morning safe check shows Rs 10,000 over at OPD counter. Request Finance to review CCTV, reconcile receipts, and pass adjustment.
Evening gusty rain delayed courier with signed credit bills; month-end insurer submission at risk. Please accept scanned copies tonight.
Two units overspent petty cash without vouchers. Need Finance to regularize via IOUs before February close.
New ECG tariff didn’t load on the billing system; a few patients were overcharged by about Rs. 200 each. Please correct the rate and arrange refunds/revised receipts.
Agrahara claims for six OPD prescriptions bounced due to drug code mismatch after the HIS update. Need Finance claims team to correct and resubmit before month-end.
Thunderstorm caused a power dip; POS captured 11 card payments but HIS didn’t post them. Please reconcile and confirm settlement before tonight’s bank batch.
Discharge bill shows private room rate instead of semi. Family is waiting—request Finance to reclassify bed charges and reissue the receipt.
Linen supplier is holding delivery; last month’s invoice is unpaid pending WHT certificate. Need AP to issue WHT and release payment urgently.
March payroll preview misses ICU night allowance and OT for two shifts after roster import. Please rectify before the bank file upload.
One CT case got billed twice due to duplicate order entry. Kindly void the duplicate and adjust the insurer claim.
Corporate client AR shows unapplied receipts for Feb (ABC Bank wellness camp). Please allocate against pending invoices to prevent dunning notices.
Orthopaedic implant vendor will not release consignment until Rs. 940,000 from Feb cases is cleared; PO/GRN mismatch flagged. Request AP to resolve and pay today.
Agrahara portal is intermittently down; today’s OPD claims are queued offline. Please coordinate deadline tolerance and push the batch once stable.
Private ward patient disputes ICU surcharge not supported on the BHT. Please audit and remove if not justified before discharge.
OPD dressing clinic imprest (Rs. 15,000) is exhausted after the weekend. Request petty cash top-up to start morning sessions.
Vendor invoice for ventilator PM has the wrong VAT rate. Need AP to correct the tax code and reprocess payment.
Several thermal receipts blurred. Please reprint and note the exception for audit before EOD.
Final bill missed the maternity package discount on labs and scans. Kindly apply package rates and arrange a refund to the family.
Fuel supplier placed us on credit hold; Rs. 1.2M diesel invoice overdue and generator refill due tomorrow. Need immediate payment release.
Internal audit found two theatre cash refunds without counterfoils. Request Finance to trace receipts and update the audit trail.
Implant and consumable charges posted under the wrong procedure code; pre-auth number doesn’t match. Please correct codes to avoid claim denial.
Corporate tariff (Union Bank contract) not applied on four inpatient physio sessions; AR raised at rack rate. Need rebill and credit note.
After the burst of rain, the HIS–Finance interface queue is stuck; 73 finalized encounters not posted to GL. Request Finance to clear before EOD.
Rice supplier warned of cutting Monday delivery; Rs. 350,000 bill is past terms. Please process AP payment today.
Bank rejected salary file; four locum MOs have invalid account formats. Need corrected bank file before 03:00 PM cut-off.
Q2 budget upload shows Radiology negative variance due to duplicated OT estimate. Please review and reforecast before CFO sign-off.
Evening thunder delayed insurer courier; discharge patient needs final guarantee letter. Kindly arrange email guarantee and hold deposit till received.
eChannelling prepayments for five consults didn’t sync to HIS; patients requesting refunds. Please verify merchant settlement and process refunds.
New April consultant tariff not loaded in HMS; morning OPD bills undercharged by ~10% (23 patients). Please correct and issue debit notes.
Lightning caused a brief power dip; two POS terminals didn't settle EOD. LKR 364,500 in card sales not posted—need manual batch close and reconciliation.
Agrahara and private insurer portals timed out during storm; 18 e-claims show submitted without receipt. Please confirm transmission or resubmit before cutoff.
Bank cash pickup skipped due to heavy rain/wind; OPD+Lab cash exceeds safe limit by ~LKR 480,000. Request emergency morning pickup and interim register entry.
Supplier invoice for sutures shows 520 units; GRN logged 500. Value difference LKR 62,500. Please hold AP and obtain a credit note.
Late storm caused moisture damage to scans; six insurer attachments are unreadable and got auto-rejected. Need re-scan and re-upload tonight.
Cafeteria contractor says March invoice unpaid after bank change. Update vendor master (new People's Bank a/c) and release LKR 220,000 to avoid service disruption.
During lightning, IPG callbacks failed; eChannelling online payments show paid in gateway but not in HMS (12 transactions). Need Finance to reconcile and post.
CT list halted 2 hours for safety; 8 patients requested refunds or rebooking. Please authorise refunds totalling LKR 142,000 and adjust revenue.
SLIPS upload for locum payments (LKR 1.2M, 38 doctors) timed out in storm; cutoff missed. Need CEFTS run or cash advance by morning.
Avurudu bank holidays : deposits stacked and safe nearing limit (~LKR 2.5M). Request holiday vault arrangement and provisional receipts.
Ambulance toll slips got wet in the rain; ink bled and claims stuck. Please verify via e-receipt portal and clear reimbursements.
Oxygen supplier early-payment discount 2% on LKR 2.1M expires today. Please process RTGS before 04:00 PM to retain discount.
Midday audit shows till short by LKR 5,000; ECG tariff auto-overrode to old code during rush. Request Finance to investigate and adjust.
Pre-auth lines were down; 3 implants used on assurance patients without prior approval. Finance to file retro authorisations urgently.
Consultant fee split for Saturday clinic not posted; two consultants awaiting transfer (~LKR 180,000). Please post and remit today.
Petty cash vouchers for reagents totalling LKR 78,300 lack approvals; month-close pending. Need Finance to regularise and post.
Power trip during storm corrupted billing; 17 inpatient folios missing room charges. Please restore from backup and re-bill before discharge.
Surgical ward POS offline after thunder; 5 discharges waiting with cards. Request manual imprinter/4G backup and later batch posting.
Physio package billed twice to one OPD patient; insurer copy already printed. Please reverse duplicate and notify insurer to avoid denial.
Leak during gusts dampened cheque box; ink on 3 post-dated cheques smeared. Bank may reject. Need replacements from payers tomorrow.
Audit note: pharmacy expiry write-offs (LKR 153,000) lack approval trail in system. Finance to compile support and pass journal.
April OT for attendants (192 hrs) not in payroll preview. Please run off-cycle adjustment and reflect in payslips.
CEFTS batch for consultant payouts returned—11 beneficiaries have wrong NIC in bank master. Need corrections and re-send tonight.
Two ICU GRNs posted without cost centre; month-end close blocked. Kindly assign ICU/CCU codes and finalise posting.
POS at OPD are out; we issued 47 manual receipts (Book A172). Finance to reconcile and post the cash/cards against MRNs today.
Vendor for sterilization pouches declined cheque collection due to gusty weather and asked for EFT before dispatch. Please process urgent transfer to avoid CSSD stock-out.
Request Finance approval to e-submit Sri Lanka Insurance and Union Assurance claim bundles and send extension letters for deadlines.
April ICU on-call allowances for 6 nurses not captured in the payroll register. Finance Payroll to add arrears in May cycle.
Meropenem shipment on hold; supplier flagged overdue Invoice INV-2317. Finance AP to clear payment today or provide remittance proof.
Leak during heavy rain damaged printed discharge bills for 12 inpatients awaiting insurer stamping. Finance AR to regenerate bills and share soft copies.
Surgical OT overtime spend exceeded monthly allocation by 18%. Request Finance to revise forecast and open a sub cost-center for weekend cases.
Petty cash float exhausted; bank delayed due to rain and wind. Need emergency top-up for patient transfer hire charges today.
We missed bank cut-off due to continuous rain; deposit slip dated 08th but posted on 09th. Finance to advise on backdating vs reconciliation adjustment.
Receipt printer rebooted and duplicated numbers R-105432 to R-105436. Finance to audit and cancel the duplicate series in the cashiering system.
Case cancelled; card refund LKR 38,500 pending as payment gateway went offline during the downpour. Request manual refund processing by Finance.
Insurer rejected Ward 3 claim for wrong ICD-10 and tariff map. Finance Claims to correct coding, attach consultant endorsement, and resubmit.
Dinner supply threatened; vendor insists last month’s bill is unpaid. Waterlogging has disrupted them already—please release AP payment today.
APIT and ETF were miscalculated for a MO with locum hours; double deduction flagged in previews. Finance Payroll to correct before payslips issue.
Toll and parking receipts from transfers got smudged in prolonged rain. Finance to accept scanned duplicates or obtain RDA e-statements for reimbursement.
Corporate client ABC Garments exceeded credit limit; staff need direction on co-pay. Finance to update contract terms and system credit block.
Request Finance approval to exchange unfit notes at bank and adjust the cashbook.
CT scanner asset insurance premium due tomorrow; insurer warned of lapse. Finance to process payment and share cover note to keep service active.
Network down in rain; took 28 card payments via manual imprints. Finance to batch process and reconcile with the EOD list.
Ceypetco price cut in effect; please revise ambulance fuel surcharge in tariff and issue credit notes for last week’s transfers.
SPC distributor holding reagents over 3-way match issues (PO vs GRN vs invoice). Finance AP to clear discrepancies and release payment.
Vesak festival advances for 17 attendants not posted. Finance Payroll to run an off-cycle disbursement today.
Agrahara portal timing out in thunderstorms; month-end cut-off at risk. Need Finance to issue extension request and approve physical courier to Colombo.
ICU implant billed under wrong tariff; detected in pre-close check. Finance to raise credit note and rebill to correct cost center before closure.
Transport petty cash exceeded by LKR 8,200. Request Finance to regularize settlement and top-up for return leg.
Card terminals went offline. we issued manual receipts for 31 OPD visits—need reconciliation and batch settlement.
Courier couldn’t reach due to the evening storm; reagent vendor cheques will miss due date, risking penalty—please arrange online transfer today.
eChannelling settlement shows the Orthopaedics clinic overcharged gateway fees for two slots; request verification and reversal.
May night-duty allowance for six nurses is missing in the payroll draft; please correct before bank file upload.
Inpatient stent (consignment) used in Cath Lab not billed due to delayed GRN; need AR adjustment and insurer claim addendum.
please request deadline extension and permit scanned copies of SLI General claims bundle.
POS pushed a duplicate batch for afternoon OPD—need immediate reversals with the acquiring bank.
Cashier used an outdated FX rate on a USD invoice; requires LKR refund adjustment and reissue of bill.
CEB bill picked up a late fee after yesterday’s CEFTS outage during rain; please lodge waiver request and settle today.
Insurer pre-auth number not captured for this evening’s laparoscopic case; finance to obtain retro authorization to avoid denial.
Fuel supplier invoice shows wrong VAT and SSCL rates; need corrected tax invoice before posting to AP.
Brief heavy rain knocked the LankaQR scanner offline; we collected cash for 54 tickets—please reconcile manual log to HIS.
Shared procedure fee split posted 50:50 instead of 60:40; adjust before consultant payout run.
Flooded staff car park led to unplanned night OT for security; include in June payroll with EPF/ETF and confirm cost centre.
Courier delayed; 40 Allianz claims will miss cut-off—please email scans and secure acceptance.
Early-payment discount on SPC invoice expires today; internet was unstable after the downpour—request priority online payment.
System froze during the rain burst; CT contrast was billed twice—need credit note and insurer notification.
LankaQR deposits from OPD (Rs 187,500) not interfacing to HIS since noon; please create AR suspense and trace with the bank.
Updated PAYE brackets not applied to two junior MOs; June deductions incorrect—recalculate and process arrears.
Dialysis consumable budget exceeded due to SPC price revision; request mid-year forecast update before audit committee.
Handwritten receipts issued 08:45–09:15—please post to ledgers with scans attached.
Agrahara ward claims returned for missing ICD-10 descriptors; need corrected tariffs and a resubmission letter.
CEFTS downtime blocked today’s payment run; NWSDB bill due—please process manual counter payment to avoid service issues.
Gateway settlement omits two rescheduled ENT sessions; require adjustment note and consultant fee recalculation.
Physiotherapy petty cash shows unsigned chits and missing bills; request finance to initiate CAP and recover advances.
End-of-day HMS shows LKR 5,000 more than physical cash; two manual receipts during a rush weren’t posted. Request Finance to reconcile and adjust Z-report.
Thunderstorm knocked card terminals offline; we used manual imprinter slips for 14 patients. Finance needs to settle with the bank and prevent duplicate charges.
Private room discharge pending >24 hrs as consultant fee not posted to the bill. Please raise the fee note and close the account today.
Supplier invoice GRN posted twice, causing stock and ledger mismatch. Need Finance to reverse the duplicate and note for internal audit.
July payroll draft missed ETU night shift allowances despite roster upload. Please correct pay codes before bank file submission.
Agrahara OPD claims for 5–6 July couldn’t dispatch due to steady rain; courier declined pickup. Need approval for alternate courier and note late submission.
Linen vendor halted supply citing 60+ day overdue invoice. Finance to release urgent part-payment or operations tomorrow will be affected.
Corporate client (ABC Garments) billed as cash by mistake. Please reclassify to corporate A/R and issue credit note to the patient.
HMS retried posts and duplicated 18 lab charges. Need Finance to run reversal batch before daily statements.
My fee for 07/07 OT case isn’t on the patient’s final bill; insurer needs proper ICD/procedure mapping. Kindly post the professional fee today.
WHT rate applied incorrectly on a service invoice; supplier is disputing. Please correct withholding and reprocess in this week’s payment run.
Canteen bill shows 120 extra staff meals vs diet sheets and ward census. Request Finance to verify and adjust the PO amount.
OT slips uploaded but not appearing in July advances. Please validate and include.
Channeling counter deposit reconciliation short by LKR 32,000 vs bank slip. Need Finance to investigate and pass adjustment.
Cheque printer misfeeds; three cheques spoiled. Please place stop-payments and reissue via EFT today.
Reference lab is withholding reports until our overdue remittance clears. Need urgent EFT to release results and avoid patient escalations.
Maternity package billed under local tariff instead of SAARC rate for a foreign patient. Please correct and reissue for insurance.
Ambulance fuel card declined; vendor placed account on hold over unpaid June bill. Request immediate settlement or cash advance.
Morning dampness affected a batch of original cash receipts near the window. Need Finance guidance on reprints and audit annotations.
Parent paid by card and then cash due to queue confusion. Please process card refund and adjust the cashbook.
EPF/ETF for three contract physiotherapists calculated on wrong pay codes. Need recalculation and correction on the Labour portal.
Insurer portal kept failing during gusty rain; endoscopy pre-auth lapsed. Please lodge appeal and waiver letter citing outage logs.
Co-pay balances for 11 chronic patients aged >90 days. Request Finance to arrange instalment plans and flag bookings pending agreement.
UPS battery invoice arrived in USD while PO is in LKR; customs and taxes included ambiguously. Need Finance to validate FX rate and tax treatment before payment.
Widespread rain caused power dips; EOD close failed and sales not posted to GL. Need Finance to run recovery and close period tonight.
New August tariff update for minor procedures not pushed to the billing system; OPD bills printed at old rates. Finance to correct and issue refunds where needed.
Advance deposit from BHT 23/1147 not adjusted after bed downgrade; patient discharging by 2 pm. Please finalize refund through cashier.
Corporate credit line with Sri Lanka Insurance for OPD meds reached limit; AR team to obtain extension or switch to cash until approval.
Pre-authorization for MRI (Ceylinco) pending on TPA portal; patient ready now. Finance claims team please expedite guarantee of payment.
ICU night-duty allowance for July not reflected for five nurses due to roster import error. Need off-cycle adjustment in this month’s payroll.
Signed cheques not delivered to oxygen supplier. Request urgent CEFTS transfer to avoid supply hold.
POS declines at peak. Need approval for manual receipts and temporary cash float top-up.
Provision supplier early-payment discount (2%) lapses today; last month’s GRNs cleared. Please release payment to capture discount.
AMC invoice for anaesthesia machines stuck in approval; vendor refusing urgent visit without payment schedule. Finance to confirm release.
Agrahara claim for BHT 23/1289 rejected for missing ICD-10 on e-form; finance claims needs resubmission coordination before month-end.
Clients expect same-day e-bills. Please issue provisional invoices to keep AR current.
Locum session payments for July not credited; eChannelling and theatre lists attached. Request settlement before next roster.
Extra guards for last week’s VIP visit did 36 OT hours; sheets submitted. Kindly include in August payroll to avoid grievances.
Main store petty cash reimbursement pending since 05/08; we can’t procure autoclave tape today. Request immediate top-up.
Rain delays plus fuel station declined our diesel credit due to overdue bill. Need urgent payment to restore ambulance fueling.
Cash count variance of LKR 7,500 at OPD closing on 17/08; request reconciliation and CCTV review before posting to GL.
Normal delivery package billed without the circular maternity discount; family disputing. Finance to adjust before discharge at 3 pm.
TPA claims portal subscription suspended due to unpaid invoice; e-submissions blocked ahead of Nikini Poya cut-offs. Need immediate payment.
External laundry vendor held today’s pickup citing 45-day overdue. With thundery rain, ward linen backlog will escalate. Please settle.
Senior citizen concession not applied at counters since last finance circular; need billing table update and refunds for today’s OPD tokens.
Internal audit noted 12 pharmacy credit bills missing insurer authorization scans. Retrieval needed before audit review on 26/08.
eChannelling commission for Dr. Silva deducted twice on 18/08; request reconciliation and reversal entry.
SPC supplier statement shows variance: GRN posted but invoice not booked, aging at 60 days. AP team to match and settle.
EPF/ETF not set up for two July joiners; need backdated contributions and payslip corrections before month-end.
SLIPS window may be missed for salaries. Request CEFTS contingency and approval to release today.
Start-of-day cash float short by LKR 25,000 and 31 Aug card settlement not posted; need top-up and posting to proceed with morning clinics.
Inpatient BHT 24-3176 charged meropenem 1g twice; please correct bill and process LankaQR refund to guardian.
CT cash patient MRN 102334 deposit collected yesterday not applied; HIS shows pending receipting—please allocate so report can be released.
SLIC e-claims timeouts; cataract pre-auth expires today—need deposit hold extension and manual claim submission.
Diesel supplier invoice INV-DS/2311 exceeds LPO rate by Rs 12.50/litre; please hold payment and obtain corrected tax invoice/debit note.
NICU phototherapy day-2 missed for BHT 24-3391; SLIC GL balance adequate—kindly add supplementary billing and inform insurer.
Brief rain-related network drop led to duplicate POS authorizations for MRN 77452; please void one and reconcile with bank batch.
Portering OT (Aug) missing in payroll draft; approved timesheets attached—add OT and night allowance before EPF/ETF calculation.
Two transfer cases paid cash; thunderstorm prevented deposit—placed in night safe with slips. Please acknowledge and post to AR by morning.
AIA claim for OP labs (MRN 55621) rejected for ICD mismatch; request finance claims team to correct code, re-upload, and track TAT.
August professional fee for THR (BHT 24-3289) not credited; surgeon paid. Please review PF schedule, tax deductions, and release.
MedSurg submitted duplicate invoices against GRN 8421; kindly block in AP run and obtain credit note before cheque cycle.
Last week’s SLIPS payment returned due to name mismatch; please reprocess via CEFTS to acct 0112xxxxxxx—arrears now 14 days.
GRN scan unreadable and invoice INV-4471 flagged. Request acceptance of vendor copy or allow reprint for audit.
Need urgent top-up of Rs 100/50 notes. LankaQR intermittent—please liaise with bank.
Package renewal for MRN 66890 charged VAT on service; dialysis service should be VAT-exempt—please amend bill and refund card difference.
AMC invoice from TechCare missing agreed retention and WHT lines; hold payment and request revised tax invoice.
Petty cash reimbursement for linen/bleach pending 3 days; ward running short—please replenish float tonight.
Delayed POS auto-post; recon gap LKR 148,350 across Sampath/EasyPay. Need manual JV and bank confirmation today.
37 pre-paid bookings pending refund. Please process LankaQR reversals within 24 hrs to avoid complaints.
Final bill for BHT 24-3510 shows ICU bed 23–24 Sep in error; please amend and reprint for insurer GL so discharge can proceed.
Agrahara maternity claims (3 cases) returned for missing hospital seal/finance sign; need stamping and resubmission before month-end.
CEFTS credit LKR 62,500 on 26 Sep unmapped; payer ref shows 'MRN 90331?'. Please allocate before statements go out.
Laundry vendor halted pickups over two overdue invoices; request urgent part-payment via online transfer to resume service today.
Q4 upload shows pharmacy ultrasound trolley coded to OPEX instead of CAPEX; need JV reclass and forecast update for Board pack.
POS flickered and posted duplicate card payments for 6 OPD bills. Need Finance to verify with bank and process reversals by tonight.
Vendors for linen and oxygen are waiting. Request emergency CEFTS transfers to avoid supply disruption.
LankaQR went offline. 14 patients were issued manual receipts. Please reconcile and post these against HIS once bank settlement appears.
CT with contrast tariff update not applied; morning cases were underbilled. Need Finance to adjust charges and reprint invoices before discharge.
CPC fuel invoice reflects revised VAT but our PO/GRN shows old rate. Accounts Payable to amend GRN and issue corrected payment.
Leak during the thunderstorm soaked two insurer claim bundles; some receipts are smudged. Request Finance to accept certified scans for submission.
Corporate client NDB Staff Scheme is 90+ days outstanding. Please place credit hold and initiate dunning before further admissions.
Today’s OPD cash cannot be deposited due to some delay. Need Finance approval to retain overnight in safe with dual lock.
Emergency diesel purchase during rain lacked the 3-quote protocol. Please raise an emergency procurement memo for audit justification.
On-call allowance for Anaesthesia SHOs (Roster 2B) missing from September payroll. Request off-cycle adjustment this week.
HIS was down ; we issued paper bills and several consumables weren’t coded. Finance needs to map retro charges before discharges.
Online prepayments captured for evening clinic that got cancelled due to weather. Gateway shows capture but HIS not updated; need refunds processed.
SLIC is rejecting Agrahara top-up claims citing missing ICD codes on e-forms. Finance to coordinate coder sign-off and resubmit before the 30-day limit.
Two vendor cheques returned due to new signatory mismatch. Reagents at risk of supply halt; need re-issue today.
Till recount after rain-time rush is short by Rs 18,500. Request immediate cash audit and CCTV review before night close.
Double-submitted five LankaQR payments; HIS shows single receipts. Finance to verify bank logs and issue refunds if needed.
Outreach clinic revenue posted under OPD instead of Private Wing. Please reclassify cost centre to correct the month-to-date report.
Courier cancelled; insurer deadline is tomorrow. Can Finance accept scanned claims with e-stamp for timely submission?
Need guidance for documenting condition and proceeding with bank deposit.
Several prepaid dialysis no-shows. Request Finance to extend package validity and defer revenue recognition.
Audit trail shows backdated tariff change by user FIN03 on 10 Oct. Need formal justification and approval note for external audit pack.
Supplier threatens credit hold; invoice age 62 days due to PO-GRN price variance. AP to process debit note and release payment.
Network outage from torrential rain forced manual receipts; large posting backlog. Request OT approval and ensure payroll reflects extra hours.
CEFTS transfer for neurosurgery implant advance failed mid-transaction. Need urgent reprocessing or cash float to avoid case delay.
Month-end close blocked: AR ageing excludes new corporate code for Oceanic Lines. Please map ledger and regenerate statements.
LankaQR pad kept rebooting; seven OPD payments show as pending in HIS though patients’ apps show debited—needs reconciliation and manual posting before cash close.
Power flicker during heavy rain caused the card terminal to pre-authorize a private room deposit twice; family requests reversal of the extra hold—please coordinate with the acquirer.
Agrahara e-claim portal is timing out ; Ward 10 discharge is ready but we cannot upload the guarantee letter—request temporary credit extension and later resubmission.
Cheque printer is jamming due to damp paper; three vendor cheques for lab reagents are overdue—request approval to switch to EFT and email remittances.
APIT/WHT rate was misapplied to 17 consultants in October; under-deductions identified—need correcting entries and amended return to IRD.
POS network is distrupted. large pharmacy cash takings cannot be deposited tonight and batch settlements are pending—request treasury support for interim storage and next-day posting.
Corporate client Samudra Logistics is 65 days overdue for multiple inpatient bills (approx. LKR 2.1M); please issue final dunning and propose an installment plan.
Leak during squally rain soaked OPD bill bundles from 02–03 Nov; several barcodes are illegible—finance to regenerate invoices from HIS and document for audit.
CT package promo not applied due to unsynced tariff; two walk-ins were billed full—need credit notes and instant refunds before close of day.
LankaPay settlement file for 09 Nov is missing; POS totals exceed bank statement by LKR 185,340—request urgent investigation with the bank and provisional JV if needed.
Biometric readers failed during prolonged rain; OT hours and night allowance for several staff not captured—please accept signed manual muster sheets for payroll.
There are 42 channeling cancellations from 11 Nov pending refunds; card reversals are aging beyond 24 hours—need finance clearance for bulk processing today.
Armoured pickup delayed due to flooded roads; OPD cash on hand has exceeded insured limit—request temporary safe access and written endorsement from finance.
TPA rejected a claim citing ICD-10 code mismatch with the discharge summary; need coding review and resubmission within the 48-hour window.
Generator diesel invoice was posted twice (duplicate GRN) and vendor received both payments—require immediate recovery via debit note and reversal JV.
NICU consumables are 18% over the monthly budget due to extra TPN—request reforecast and interim limit adjustment before further orders.
Deposit slips from the weekend got wet in rain during courier transit; amounts on two slips are unreadable—need bank-certified copies for posting and audit.
November tea allowance was posted twice for 126 staff in the payroll preview—request reversal before generating the bank file.
Multiple LankaQR payments from last night appear duplicated after outages during heavy rain; patients report double debits—please validate and process refunds where applicable.
Linen supplier invoice due today; cheque printing stalled by moisture issues—request EFT processing and email of remittance advice.
PET/CT patient deposit was short-collected using an outdated rate card—need supplementary bill and adjustment to consultant revenue share.
Agrahara maternity claim returned for missing hospital seal on the final bill—please validate, stamp, and resubmit via courier.
